word: H62 - אָבֵל בֵּית־מֲעַכָה - ʼÂbêl Bêyth-Măʻakâh - aw-bale' bayth ma-akaw' - Abel-beth-maachah

sections.paragraph:
אבל בּית־מעכה - 'âbêl bêyth mă‛akâh - aw-bale' bayth ma-a-kaw'

From H58 and H1004 and H4601; meadow of Beth-Maakah; Abel of Beth-Maakah, a place in Palestine: - Abel-beth-maachah, Abel of Beth-maachah.
Cognate: H58, H59, H63, H64, H65, H66, H67
